caption: Will you be able to come back and work in Ireland after studying medicine abroad? Honestly: an EU medical degree such as Bulgaria's can qualify for EU automatic recognition with the Medical Council, and graduates do come home to Irish hospitals. But no medical degree — Irish or European — guarantees an Irish job. Anyone promising that is selling something. Comment DOCTOR and I'll send you the free 15-minute call link. No pitch, no pressure.
note: FALLBACK ONLY. Primary is Zernio at 19:00 Irish (server-side). This fires at 19:20 only if Zernio did not post; run_queue.py checks the live feed first and deletes this entry if it did.
